approvalSource: Steve approved the unattended overnight sprint and asked the builder to keep going, create the next sprint if the first finishes, and not stop unless unsafe.
constraints: work from live Current Sprint and repo truth, not chat-only instructions
blockers block unsafe actions, not the whole sprint; park blocked actions and continue safe work

no Value Builder split, source/value expansion, broad extraction, paid/provider/browser-auth work, credential mutation, Drive permission mutation, sends, or external writes overnight unless explicitly approved
green means raw green; repeated failures or raw workflow failures repair first
each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main
